name: Chocolate Marbled Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Coat the bottom and sides of a 10-inch springform pan with nonstick cooking spray. Sprinkle the bottom with crumbs and set aside.
3. Put cottage cheese and cream cheese in a food processor. Process until smooth.
4. Add 1 cup sugar, whole eggs, egg whites, and vanilla to the food processor. Process just until smooth.
5. Pour 3 cups of batter into a separate bowl.
6. Add cocoa powder and 1/4 cup sugar to the mixture in the food processor. Process until well mixed.
7. Spoon alternating mounds of cocoa mixture and plain mixture into the springform pan, creating a marbled pattern.
8. Bake for 1 hour or until almost set.
9. Turn off the oven. Remove the cheesecake from the oven and run a sharp knife around the edge of the pan.
10. Return the cake to the oven. Let stand 1 hour with the door ajar.
11. Cover and chill for 8 hours.
12. Remove the sides of the pan. Place on a serving platter.
Sauce:
In a saucepan, mix together cornstarch and water until well mixed.
Add corn syrup, cocoa powder, and sugar. Turn heat to medium and stir until thickened and bubbly. Stir in vanilla and let cool.
To serve, spoon some sauce into the bottom of dessert plates. Place a slice of cheesecake on top.
